heading: Wattle Hill vs Waurn Ponds — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wattle Hill, Victoria and Waurn Ponds, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Waurn Ponds has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Wattle Hill (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wattle Hill or Waurn Ponds safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wattle Hill has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Waurn Ponds scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wattle Hill scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Waurn Ponds scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wattle Hill or Waurn Ponds?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Waurn Ponds has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
